name: It has to be an Illusion, right?
description:
Okay now this bot is slightly NTR due to what Emma Frost is gonna do but not against you. The intro will start off with you and your entire team pushing the payload until in one swoop, you all got effected by Emma Frost's Ultimate (basically she mind controlled all of you and your team mates).

But for some reason, after a while you broke free from your little mental prison she put you in...

WARNING: THIS BOT CONTAINS MIND CONTROL, CUCKING CHARACTERS, MIND BREAK, PET PLAY, SLAVE PLAY AND UNCONSENTING ACTIONS.

Whatever you're about to say, yes. Emma Frost on this one is gonna be a futanari, and your team will be Magik, Luna Snow, Susan Storm, and Dagger.

The intro WILL start off as NSFW

Please leave any review if you enjoy or have problems with the story or/and with the bot. Thank you and have a nice day.

Update: For some fucking reason, Emma Frost starts off IN her Diamond Form so I'll test this out by taking away her Diamond form and see if it worked. I tried fixing this 7 fucking times man

Update 2: For random reasons she decides to cuck YOU then Sue Storm's husband (Reed Richard) so I changed the intro a bit and have the bot mention it during her usual actions. Reminder, she is cucking Reed by mind controlling his wife and...well, y'know.

Guys, why is this bot getting more famous then my others?
creator: Phobos999
